item.description:
# Portfolix v0.1.5
Portfolix v0.1.5 进一步提升了资产总览的信息密度与投资画像的分析能力。
## 新功能
- **更智能的投资画像**：分析资产背后的实际投资地区、资产类别与重复基准，能够更准确地识别 QDII 等跨市场资产的真实敞口；联网增强模式可按需补充公开资料。 - **每日盈亏**：新增日历和柱状图两种视图，支持按月切换，直观查看每日收益、本月累计以及盈利和亏损天数。 - **年度组合价值曲线**：组合价值卡片新增低干扰的年度资产价值背景曲线，按照真实日期展示资产变化，并将最新数据点定位到实际日期。
## 体验优化
- 统一投资画像、收益趋势和年度资产曲线的视觉样式。 - 优化组合价值卡片的信息布局、曲线平滑度和更新操作位置。 - 完善亮色与暗色模式下的数据可读性和图表层级。
---
Portfolix v0.1.5 improves portfolio visibility and makes the investment profile more context-aware.
## What's New
- **Smarter investment profile**: Looks through holdings to identify their underlying geographic, asset-class, and benchmark exposure, including cross-market products such as QDII funds. Connected mode can retrieve additional public information when needed. - **Daily Profit & Loss**: Adds calendar and bar-chart views with monthly navigation, daily results, monthly totals, and profitable/loss-making day counts. - **Year-to-date portfolio value curve**: Adds a subtle annual value curve to the portfolio card, mapped to real snapshot dates with the latest point positioned at its actual date.
## Improvements
- Unified chart styling across the investment profile, performance trend, and annual value curve. - Refined the portfolio card layout, curve rendering, and refresh control placement. - Improved chart hierarchy and readability in both light and dark appearances.
